title: "race()"
description: "race: the FIRST dep to deliver DATA wins; thereafter only the winner's messages flow (losers are dropped, including their terminals). `partial:true` + `ctx.state` winner. `errorWhenDepsError:false` (a LOSER's error must not error the race — only the winner's) + `completeWhenDepsComplete:false + terminalAsRealInput:true`. <!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

race: the FIRST dep to deliver DATA wins; thereafter only the winner's messages flow (losers are
dropped, including their terminals). `partial:true` + `ctx.state` winner. `errorWhenDepsError:false`
(a LOSER's error must not error the race — only the winner's) + `completeWhenDepsComplete:false +
terminalAsRealInput:true`. If every dep terminates before any DATA, COMPLETE.

## Import

```ts
import { race } from "@graphrefly/ts";
```

## Signature

```ts
function race(): Operator<S, S>
```

## Returns

`Operator<S, S>`
